description: A pull_request_target workflow checks out and runs the fork PR head with base-repo secrets and write token in scope.
body: Failure mode: a workflow uses on: pull_request_target, then actions/checkout with ref: the PR head, and runs the PR's build scripts while the job holds the base repo's secrets and a write-capable GITHUB_TOKEN, letting attacker-controlled code read secrets and push to the repo. Detection signals: pull_request_target combined with checkout of github.event.pull_request.head, secrets referenced in that job, and the workflow accepting fork PRs. Do not execute PR-head code under pull_request_target with secrets present. Safer fallback: build/test untrusted code under pull_request (no secrets), gate any privileged follow-up behind workflow_run or a protected environment, and verify no secret is in scope where fork code runs.
